parsed.summary: This is the cover page of an installation and operation manual for a TICA brand modular air-cooled chiller (heat pump). The page displays the manual title in English and Chinese, the equipment type, and the manufacturer's logo.

parsed.summary: This is a mostly blank page with contact information for two HVAC companies (TICA Nanjing and TICA Tianjin) printed vertically on the right side, along with a disclaimer about product changes and a version number. There is also a handwritten note '30/5-2-35' and a watermark at the bottom.
parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
南京天加空调设备有限公司
TICA (NANJING) AIR-CONDITIONING CO.,LTD.
地址：中国江苏南京经济技术开发区恒业路6号
电话：86-25-85326977 传真：86-25-85323095
http://www.ticachina.com E-mail:tca@ticachina.com
邮编：210046

天津天加空调设备有限公司
TICA (TIANJIN) AIR-CONDITIONING CO.,LTD.
地址：中国天津市北辰区华苑产业区祥苑路12号
电话：022-83712735 传真：022-83712731
http://www.ticachina.com E-mail:jp@ticachina.com
邮编：300384

注：由于天加公司产品会不断改良和创新，因此本资料所载产品型号、规格和参数如有变动，恕不另行通知，敬请注意和谅解。 版号：10-05
